cookies_text: We use cookies to ensure the proper functioning of the website, to protect forms (reCAPTCHA), and to analyze website traffic. Details can be found in
footer_text1: We design systems that make sense — today and in the future.
form_submit_error: A server error occurred. Please try again later.
how_we_work_text1:
We don’t start with [[design]].
We start with [[meaning]].
how_we_work_text2:
A project is not an [[image]].
It is a [[system]] that must work
today and [[grow tomorrow]].
how_we_work_text3:
We don’t build [[one-off solutions]].
We create [[architecture]] that can be developed further.
Every technical decision has its [[reason]].
Every line of code has [[consequences]].
how_we_work_text4:
Technology is not an addition to a project.
It is its [[foundation]].
how_we_work_text5:
Web. Backend. 3D. Simulations.
Not separately — in [[one ecosystem]].
how_we_work_text6:
We don’t promise everything.
[[We speak plainly]] when something doesn’t make sense.
We work as a [[technology partner]],
not as a checklist-driven contractor.
how_we_work_text7:
We build solutions ready for the future.
For [[growth. Integrations. Automation.]]
For what comes next.
must_contain: The message must be at least 20 characters long!
must_contain_two_letters: The text must contain at least two letters!
name: Name

services_text1: We design and deliver advanced digital solutions – from IT systems, through simulations and 3D environments, to future technologies.
services_text2: Modern web and mobile applications tailored to real business and technical needs.
services_text7: Design of architecture, backends, and scalable systems. Integrations, automation, security, and performance.
services_text12: Creation of realistic simulations and 3D environments for training, research, and industrial applications.
services_text17: Training and simulation systems supporting educational and decision-making processes.
services_text22: Virtual studios, visualizations, and XR solutions for production, presentation, and broadcasting.
technologies_text1: We work with proven technologies that allow us to build and develop applications, systems, and 3D and VR environments within a single, cohesive ecosystem.
technologies_text2: Our goal is not to lock projects into a single technology, but to combine competencies and systems — both our own and those of partners — into solutions that operate reliably in production.
technologies_text4: support other teams as a technology partner,
technologies_text5: integrate with existing systems and pipelines,
technologies_text6: take responsibility for selected areas of a project (frontend, backend, realtime, 3D, VR, infrastructure),
technologies_text7: deliver components that naturally fit into larger initiatives.
technologies_text8: We work both on projects built from scratch and on the expansion, integration, and modernization of existing solutions — from web applications and IT systems to simulations, realtime environments, and virtual studios.
technologies_text9: We treat technology as a shared language of collaboration rather than a barrier — which is why we focus on solutions that are clear, extensible, and ready for further development by other teams.
technologies_text10: We design and develop modern web applications and user interfaces that serve as a stable access layer to systems, data, and realtime environments.
technologies_text11: We treat frontend technologies as part of system architecture, not merely a visual layer. We focus on performance, code clarity, and the ability for further development — both by our team and by partner teams.
technologies_text13: React and Next.js for building SPA and SSR applications,
technologies_text14: TypeScript as the foundation for safety and scalability,
technologies_text16: WebGL where the interface requires 3D graphics or realtime data handling.
technologies_text20: frontend layers for complex backend systems,
technologies_text21: interfaces connecting web applications with 3D engines and VR environments.

technologies_text25: be developed in parallel with other project components.
technologies_text26: As a result, web and applications serve as a cohesive system interface rather than a one-off visual implementation.
technologies_text27: We design and develop system backends and business logic that form a stable foundation for web applications, 3D environments, and realtime solutions.
technologies_text28: We treat the backend as the central element of system architecture, responsible for data consistency, process control, and integration with other components — both internal and external.
technologies_text29:
We are not limited to a single language or technology stack.
The choice of backend technology depends on the nature of the system, performance requirements, and the target environment.

technologies_text32: solutions developed in Kotlin and other JVM languages,
technologies_text33: system and performance-oriented components implemented in C++,
technologies_text34: REST APIs and realtime solutions for event handling, synchronization, and data streaming.

technologies_text45: As a result, backend systems act as a cohesive control center, regardless of whether they are part of a web application, an industrial system, a simulation environment, or a realtime solution.
technologies_text46: We design and develop 3D environments, simulations, and realtime applications used in training, visualization, interactive systems, and VR solutions.
technologies_text47: We treat realtime engines as a full-fledged system component rather than just a visual layer. Logic, data, and interaction are designed to integrate with web applications, backends, and other systems.

technologies_text62: clear integration with other project components,
technologies_text63: collaboration with backend and frontend teams.
technologies_text64: As a result, realtime solutions serve as an active system layer rather than an isolated visual element.
technologies_text65: We design and implement virtual studios and realtime production environments used in live broadcasts, video production, presentations, and live visual systems.
technologies_text66: We treat virtual studio technologies as complex technical systems combining realtime engines, image rendering, time synchronization, and integration with hardware infrastructure and control systems.
technologies_text68: Unreal Engine as the realtime rendering and logic engine,
technologies_text69: XR technologies used in production environments,

technologies_text74: ensure synchronization of image, data, and motion,

technologies_text82: As a result, studio solutions become a full-fledged part of the system rather than a visual layer added at the end of the process.
technologies_text83: We design and maintain runtime environments that ensure stable system operation at every stage — from development and testing to production.
technologies_text84: We treat infrastructure as an integral part of the system rather than a separate post-development phase. We focus on automation, predictability, and the ability for partner teams to further develop and maintain solutions.
technologies_text86: CI/CD processes enabling safe and repeatable deployments,
